series_metadata.series_title: Sexual Battery and Rape Offense Prosecuted Cases
series_metadata.series_description: Prosecuted cases by the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) concerning felony-level sex offenses as those stipulated in ORC sections 2907.02 and 2907.03. Records include, but are not be limited to, pleadings, memorandum, affidavits, attorney work product, legal research, motions, judgments, discovery, evidence, transcripts, correspondence, settlement and negotiation documents, hearing and deposition materials, and reports from local law enforcement.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from case closing. If case resulted in a not guilty verdict or no bills, 2 years from case closing. ; Paper: from case closing. If case resulted in a not guilty verdict or no bills, 2 years from case closing. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
